body.processed:
Kick off the wedding weekend with a relaxed welcome dinner under the stars. We'll gather for wood-fired pizza, local wines, and lawn games as out-of-town guests arrive and everyone gets acquainted.

This is a casual affair -- think sundresses and linen shirts. No gifts necessary, just bring your appetite and your best stories about the bride and groom!
body.summary: Kick off the wedding weekend with a relaxed welcome dinner under the stars. We'll gather for wood-fired pizza, local wines, and lawn games as out-of-town guests arrive and everyone gets acquainted.Thi

eventImage.alt: Elegant outdoor dinner table with string lights

body.processed:
Join us as we exchange vows in a heartfelt ceremony in the Rosewood Estate rose garden. The ceremony will be officiated by our dear friend, Father Michael Torres, and will feature readings by members of the wedding party.

What to Expect

  • Guests will be seated by 3:45 PM
  • The ceremony begins promptly at 4:00 PM
  • The ceremony will last approximately 30 minutes
  • Cocktail hour follows immediately on the terrace

Please note that the ceremony will take place outdoors on grass. We recommend flat shoes or wedges.
body.summary: Join us as we exchange vows in a heartfelt ceremony in the Rosewood Estate rose garden. The ceremony will be officiated by our dear friend, Father Michael Torres, and will feature readings by members

eventImage.alt: Beautiful outdoor ceremony setup with floral arch

body.processed:
After the ceremony, join us in the Grand Ballroom for an evening of dining, dancing, and celebration! Our reception will feature a four-course dinner prepared by Chef Antoine Laurent, an open bar with signature cocktails, and live music from The Silver Notes.

Evening Timeline

  • 4:30 PM - Cocktail hour on the terrace
  • 6:00 PM - Doors open to the Grand Ballroom
  • 6:30 PM - First dance and toasts
  • 7:00 PM - Dinner service
  • 8:30 PM - Cake cutting
  • 9:00 PM - Dancing until midnight

Late-night snacks will be served at 10:30 PM. A shuttle service will run between the venue and partner hotels from 10:00 PM to 1:00 AM.
